FABRIOZA

ISO 9001 Certified Custom Clothing Manufacturer | Low MOQ 50 pcs

Home / Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: July 1, 2026

At FABRIOZA, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website or use our services.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, including: name, email address, phone number, company name, and design files when you submit a quote request or contact form.

How We Use Your Information

  • To respond to your inquiries and provide quotes
  • To process and manufacture your orders
  • To send order updates and shipping notifications
  • To improve our website and services

Information Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted shipping partners (DHL, FedEx, UPS) solely for delivery purposes.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All data transmission is encrypted using SSL/TLS technology.

Cookies

Our website uses cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us at info@fabrioza.com for any privacy-related requests.

Contact Us

For questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@fabrioza.com or through our contact form.

FABRIOZA — Custom Clothing Manufacturer

ISO 9001 Certified

USA Office: 157 Everett Sq, McDonough, GA 30252, United States

Factory / Head Office: Saro Street, near Fateh Garh Road, Sialkot 51310, Pakistan
